metadata.name: Testie
metadata.author: hype
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Ravenshire to break the spell.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Ravenshire
towns.description: A quiet hamlet nestled among rolling hills, known for its warm hearths.

towns.name: Oakglen
towns.description: A bustling market town where traders from distant lands hawk exotic wares.

key_dungeons.name: Crimson Tomb
key_dungeons.description: Water seeps from the walls near Crimson Tomb's entrance. The stone steps descend into darkness.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Crimson Tomb and recover the lost Bronze Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.
